settings.text: I've tried a lot of handmade soaps and nothing compares. My skin has never felt better and the scent lasts all day. Absolutely love everything from Papa Stan's!
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.text: Ordered the candles as a gift and ended up keeping them for myself. The scent is incredible — not overpowering, just warm and perfect. Will be ordering again.
settings.name: James T.

settings.text: Papa Stans is amazing! The lotion is so smooth and you can tell it's made with real ingredients. Supporting a veteran-owned small business is just the cherry on top.
settings.name: Jay

settings.text: I got the sample pack with my order and now I need full sizes of everything. The brown sugar scrub especially — my skin felt brand new after one use.
settings.name: Melissa R.
